name: Code
description: Inline or block monospace code snippet with optional copy button.

api.name: Code
api.description: Inline or block monospace code snippet with optional copy button.

parameters.name: Source
parameters.description: Raw source to render (block variant). When set together with Highlighter the output is syntax-highlighted; otherwise the source is rendered as escaped plain text. Falls back to ChildContent when null. (#196)

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Language hint (e.g. "csharp", "ts") — emitted as data-language and passed to Highlighter.

parameters.name: Highlighter
parameters.description: Pluggable syntax highlighter: (code, language) => safe HTML. Plug in Prism / Shiki / highlight.js (or a server-side highlighter). The delegate MUST return SAFE HTML — escape untrusted source. Core ships no built-in highlighter on purpose (dependency-free), mirroring StreamingText.MarkdownRenderer. Ignored unless Source is set.

examples.title: Inline
examples.code: Use the Code component to style inline code. Pass Variant="block" for multi-line blocks.

examples.title: Custom Size
examples.code: text-xs code text-base code text-lg code

examples.title: Variant — interactive
examples.code: @* inline — pill-styled within text *@ dotnet add package Lumeo @* block — full-width scrollable code block *@ dotnet add package Lumeo

mdSummary:
# Code

Inline or block monospace code snippet with optional copy button.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Typography
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/code

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Code | Variant | `string` | `"inline"` |  |
| Code | Size | `string?` | `` |  |
| Code | Source | `string?` | `` | Raw source to render (block variant). When set together with Highlighter the output is syntax-highlighted; otherwise the source is rendered as escaped plain text. Falls back to ChildContent when null. (#196) |
| Code | Language | `string?` | `` | Language hint (e.g. "csharp", "ts") — emitted as data-language and passed to Highlighter. |
| Code | Highlighter | `Func<string, string?, MarkupString>?` | `` | Pluggable syntax highlighter: (code, language) => safe HTML. Plug in Prism / Shiki / highlight.js (or a server-side highlighter). The delegate MUST return SAFE HTML — escape untrusted source. Core ships no built-in highlighter on purpose (dependency-free), mirroring StreamingText.MarkdownRenderer. Ignored unless Source is set. |
| Code | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Code | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Code | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Code) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Code />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Code/Code.razor`
